title: Build a Book Catalog Table
description: A structured book catalog table with five freeCodeCamp titles, organized with thead, tbody, and tfoot. Each row displays a book's title, author, genre, and publication year. The footer row uses colspan to span all four columns and shows the total book count.
objectives: Build a table with thead, tbody, and tfoot sections
Use th elements with correct column headers
Populate multiple rows of td data cells
Use colspan in tfoot to span the full table width

files.name: index.html
files.content:

How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job Quincy Larson Learn To Code 2024
The Regular Expressions Book – RegEx for JavaScript Developers Kolade Chris Regular Expressions 2023
The Python Code Example Handbook Farhan Hasin Chowdhury Python 2023
Total Books: 5
